member.name: T:IDADRS.Core.Entities.AccessLog
member.summary: Audit record for every document interaction.

member.name: P:IDADRS.Core.Entities.AccessLog.ActionType
member.summary: One of: Upload | View | Update | Delete | Download.

member.name: T:IDADRS.Core.Entities.Document
member.summary: Archived document with metadata and storage path.

member.name: P:IDADRS.Core.Entities.Document.SearchVector
member.summary: PostgreSQL GIN tsvector column — auto-generated from Title + Description.

member.name: T:IDADRS.Core.Entities.RefreshToken
member.summary: Opaque refresh token — rotated on every use.

member.name: T:IDADRS.Core.Entities.User
member.summary: Represents a system user with role-based access.

member.name: P:IDADRS.Core.Entities.User.Email
member.summary: Validated e-mail address, unique in the system.

member.name: T:IDADRS.Core.Enums.UserRole
member.summary: Application role hierarchy: Admin > Archivist > User.

member.name: T:IDADRS.Core.Interfaces.IRepository`1
member.summary: Generic repository — SOLID note: ISP satisfied by keeping this minimal. Specialised repositories add domain-specific methods without polluting this contract.

member.name: T:IDADRS.Core.Interfaces.IUnitOfWork
member.summary: Unit-of-Work — coordinates multiple repositories under one DbContext transaction. SOLID note — DIP: callers depend on this interface, not EF Core.
